title: erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. aurigeranum
intro: Erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. aurigeranum, also known as a subspecies of the Erysimum hieraciifolium plant, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is commonly known as Golden Wallflower. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Erysimum hieraciifolium subsp. aurigeranum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
